goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加 compact 只读输出

summary.title: 增加 dogfood-health compact 输出
summary.what: 给 Catty dogfood-health 增加 compact 只读输出：新增 compactCattyDogfoodHealth、CattyDogfoodHealthCompactResult 和 CLI --compact，并补测试与 README 说明。
summary.why: 长期推进 agent 每轮都需要看 live dogfood health；默认完整输出会展开 per-stage hardest misses 和 raw trail，compact 输出能保留 readiness/gates/summary/safety boundary，同时减少定位噪音和不必要的原始 trail 暴露。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加 compact 只读输出

decisions.point: compact 输出保留哪些字段
decisions.chose: 保留 readiness、blockers、recommendedNext、stageSuppressions、sampleGate、memoryCandidateGate、samplingFreshness、summary 和 safetyBoundary，省略 stages。
decisions.rationale: 这些字段足够长期 agent 判断下一步和写入边界；stages 才是包含 raw trail/hardestMisses 的大块诊断明细。
rejected: 改变默认输出为 compact，可能破坏已有调试入口
只在文档里建议少看 full output，而不提供机器可读 compact 形态

decisions.point: 是否改变 dogfood 写入策略
decisions.chose: 只增加只读输出形态，不改变 shadow sample、judge、memory candidate、canary 或 accepted-memory 写入边界。
decisions.rationale: 当前 live state 仍是 repeated-context，应等待真实 context switch；本切片只是让等待状态更容易安全检查。

review_notes: 本轮 scoped commit 为 0ec328e，实际改动文件只有 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.ts；seal prepare 的大范围 diff 是 catty 分支相对 main 的历史累积。
历史 proposed overlap 属于同一 catty 分支上的顺序 dogfood-health/readiness 切片，本改动不改变既有行为，只新增兼容 CLI flag 和导出函数。
CLAUDE.md 是无关 dirty，未 stage、未 commit；本次 seal 使用 --allow-dirty 保留该边界。

验证：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts；bun test；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check；bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --compact --max 5 smoke；bun src/ops.ts status --json --live。
compact smoke 显示 readiness=blocked、compact=true、latestPredictionAt=2026-05-26T21:49:59.336Z，且未匹配 stages/hardestMisses/actualTrail。
runtime live probe ok；launchd loaded，lastExitCode=0，无 diagnostics warnings。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains a dry-run/read-only readiness surface
compact dogfood-health output is intended for long-running agent positioning without per-stage raw trail expansion
behavioral_changes: CLI accepts --compact and returns the same readiness/gate/summary data without stages
Default dogfood-health output remains the full diagnostic result
security_implications: No secrets read or printed; compact output reduces raw trail expansion in routine health checks; no user memory writes or model calls added
